purpose: validate four state-level CF-I audit indicators on known positive and negative controls

common.stimulus: set ego speed from 0.5 m/s to 0 at the declared index

CF-I-T1.name: indexed-time alignment
CF-I-T1.measurement: maximum absolute timestamp offset at compared future indices

CF-I-T2.name: causal response onset
CF-I-T2.measurement: first responder divergence index and maximum pre-stimulus divergence
CF-I-T2.expected: accept declared-index treatment and reject anticipatory control

CF-I-T3.name: post-stimulus response existence
CF-I-T3.expected: detect aligned AttackPlanner response and no ConstantPlanner response

CF-I-T4.name: world-time state continuity
CF-I-T4.measurement: position displacement minus trapezoidal speed integral, plus acceleration bounds
CF-I-T4.expected: reject released_grid and accept aligned_grid in the selected short-step near-straight range

stop_rule: if any indicator cannot distinguish its named known controls, do not render or add a receiver
claim_boundary: indicator discrimination in this deterministic state-level construction only; no traffic realism, sensor, AD, or closed-loop credibility claim
